subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Great tidings have arrived, and joyful news hath reached 'Abdu'l-Bahá - the glad announcement of fellowship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء بشارت کبری رسید و خبر پرمسرتی عبدالبهاء شنید مژده الفت
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @praise and encouragement, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayers (general or uncategorized)
